title: SessionSendMessageResponse
description: Typed broker-mediated session interaction acknowledgement with stream-friendly sequencing metadata.

session_id.description: Canonical session identity where interaction was recorded.

turn.description: Current turn state after applying the message.

message.description: Canonical message entry that was recorded.

event_type.description: Typed ack event family for watch-stream compatibility.

stream_id.description: Stable session interaction stream identity for later watch-stream APIs.

seq.description: Monotonic sequence number scoped to stream_id for replay/watch compatibility.
